description: Golden test scenarios for mc-code intelligence features

scenarios.prompt: what files are in this project?
read src/model.rs and tell me what structs are defined
search for the word 'completed' in all source files
use write_file to create src/error.rs with: pub enum TodoError { NotFound, Empty }
read src/store.rs then add a count(&self) -> usize method using edit_file

single_edit.description: Read file then make targeted edit

scenarios.prompt: read src/model.rs then add a due_date: Option<String> field to Todo struct using edit_file
read src/store.rs then add a by_tag(&self, tag: &str) -> Vec<&Todo> method using edit_file
read src/model.rs then add a method is_overdue(&self) -> bool that returns true if completed is false. Use edit_file.
read src/store.rs and src/main.rs, then add a clear_completed method to store and call it in main
read src/model.rs and src/store.rs, then rename the field 'completed' to 'done' in both files using edit_file
the delete method in src/store.rs returns the wrong boolean. Read the file, find the bug, and fix it.
there is a bug in src/model.rs where addition is wrong. Read and fix.
scenarios.note: requires model.rs to have add function

scenarios.prompt: src/stats.rs has a type error: integer division returns usize not f64. Read and fix it.

context_awareness.description: Uses project context (CLAUDE.md, instructions, repo map)

scenarios.prompt: read CLAUDE.md and tell me what conventions this project follows
which file contains the Todo struct? answer without reading any files
add serde as a dependency and derive Serialize for Todo
scenarios.note: should refuse — CLAUDE.md says no external deps

scenarios.prompt: add an inline test to store.rs
scenarios.note: should refuse or put in tests/ — CLAUDE.md says tests go in tests/

scenarios.prompt: remember that this project's deployment target is ARM64 Linux
what do you remember about this project?
read memory and check if there are any project facts stored
read src/store.rs then refactor delete to return Result<(), TodoError> instead of bool. Create src/error.rs if needed.
read src/store.rs then make TodoStore implement Default trait
read src/model.rs then add #[must_use] attribute to Todo::new
implement an undo feature for delete: when a todo is deleted, store it in a 'trash' Vec. Add a restore(id) method to recover it. Read store.rs first.
add a to_json(&self) -> String method to Todo that outputs valid JSON using format!() only, no serde. Read model.rs first.
create a complete src/export.rs module that can export all todos as CSV format (id,title,completed,priority). Read model.rs and store.rs first.
read src/nonexistent.rs
edit src/model.rs: replace 'NONEXISTENT_STRING' with 'something'
run cargo test in this project
read src/store.rs then add tests for the stats() method in tests/store_test.rs
read src/model.rs then create tests/model_test.rs with tests for Todo::new, toggle, add_tag, and Display
read src/store.rs then add edge case tests: empty store list, search with no results, delete non-existent id
